hr.question: What are your strengths and weaknesses?
Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
Why do you want to join this company?
Tell me about a challenge you faced.

technical.question: What is the difference between C and Java?
What is Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) and what are its core pillars?
Explain the concept of inheritance and its different types.
What is a Database Management System (DBMS)?
What is the difference between SQL and NoSQL databases?
What is normalization and why do we use it in databases?
What is an API and how does it work?
What is the difference between a stack and a queue?
What is an operating system and what are its main functions?
Explain the differences between arrays and linked lists.
What is React and why is it popular?

behavioral.question: Tell me about a time you solved a difficult problem.
Describe a conflict you had in a team and how you resolved it.
How do you manage tight deadlines and prioritize your work?
Describe a leadership experience you had, either in college or a project.
Tell me about a failure you experienced and what you learned from it.
How do you react to criticism or negative feedback?
Describe a difficult decision you had to make recently.

communication.question: Introduce yourself and talk about your educational background.
Describe your hometown and what it is famous for.
Talk about your hobbies and how you spend your free time.
Explain your final year project in simple words.
Describe your biggest achievement so far.
Explain your SWOT (Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats) analysis.
Talk about your leadership experience or participation in extracurricular activities.
Describe a difficult situation you faced and how you overcame it.
Tell us about your short-term and long-term goals.

mock_hr.question: Introduce yourself to the recruitment team.
What makes you stand out from other freshers applying today?
Can you describe a situation where you had to quickly adapt to a major change?
What are your hobbies and how do they help you stay productive?
Where do you want to see your career heading in the next three to five years?
Why did you choose our company for your career start?
Tell me about a time you made a mistake during a college lab or group project.
How do you handle disagreement when working with other students?
What kind of work environment allows you to perform at your best?
What does success mean to you?

mock_technical.question: What is the difference between a compiler and an interpreter?
Explain the difference between GET and POST HTTP requests.
What is a primary key and a foreign key in a relational database?
What is virtual memory and how does it help the operating system?
Explain the difference between a class and an object in Object-Oriented Programming.
What is method overloading and method overriding? Give a simple example.
What is a pointer in C, and how does it differ from a reference in C++ or Java?
Explain the concept of local variables vs global variables.
What is the difference between linear search and binary search?
What is MVC architecture and why is it widely used?

mock_behavioral.question: Tell me about a time you had to work under a very strict deadline.
How do you handle a situation where a group member is not doing their share of work?
Describe a goal you set for yourself recently and how you achieved it.
Tell me about a time when you had to learn a new skill or tool quickly.
Describe a time you convinced someone to see things from your perspective.
Tell me about a time you had to handle multiple tasks at once during college.
Describe a time you went above and beyond to complete a project successfully.
How do you react when plans change unexpectedly?
Tell me about a time you helped a teammate who was struggling.
Describe a time you had to work with highly ambiguous instructions.

mock_communication.question: Introduce your favorite tech role model and explain why they inspire you.
Describe your college campus and highlight what you like most about it.
What is your favorite book or movie, and how would you summarize it to a friend?
If you could visit any country in the world, where would you go and why?
Explain a hobby you enjoy and why you think others should try it.
What was the most challenging topic you studied in college, and how did you master it?
Describe a normal day in your life during exam preparation.
Talk about a recent tech news story or gadget that caught your attention.
How do you define effective communication in a remote development team?
Describe what kind of projects you would love to work on in your first job.
